meta.title: Content Collections - Architecture
meta.excerpt: How content collections are structured for articles, tutorials, and case studies in Strapi.

seo.metaTitle: Content Collections in Strapi | CMS Reference
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to model and structure content collections for scalable CMS architecture.

blocks.content: Content collections define structured, repeatable content entities for your CMS-backed frontend application.

blocks.title: Best Practice
blocks.content: Keep collection schemas focused and avoid overloading single entities with too many responsibilities.
Article collections are the primary content type for blog posts, tutorials, and case studies. Each article has a comprehensive schema with metadata, SEO fields, and dynamic content blocks.

features.title: Taxonomy
features.description: Category relations, tags array, and audience targeting

features.title: SEO Fields
features.description: metaTitle, metaDescription, canonicalUrl, and social preview

features.title: Dynamic Blocks
features.description: Flexible content composition via dynamic zones

blocks.title: Article Collection Type Definition

blocks.content: Dynamic zones provide flexible content composition by allowing editors to add, remove, and reorder content blocks. This enables rich, structured content without rigid templates.

items: block.paragraph - Text content with markdown support
block.card - Content cards with optional links

blocks.title: Content Flexibility
blocks.content: Dynamic zones enable content creators to compose rich articles without developer intervention for layout changes.
Shared components are reusable building blocks defined once and used across multiple collection types. This ensures consistency and reduces duplication in content schemas.

blocks.title: Hero Component
blocks.content: Standard hero section with title, subtitle, background image, and CTA buttons

blocks.title: Feature Card
blocks.content: Icon, title, description pattern used in feature grids

blocks.title: Testimonial
blocks.content: Quote, author, company, and optional avatar image

blocks.title: Component Reusability
blocks.content: Shared components defined in Strapi can be used in multiple collection types, ensuring consistent structure and reducing maintenance overhead.
Content collections are organized hierarchically with categories, subcategories, and tags to enable flexible navigation and content discovery.

features.title: Tags
features.description: Cross-cutting topics for content filtering and related content discovery

features.title: Relationships
features.description: Explicit content relationships for navigation and recommendations

items: Category slugs map directly to URL structure
Audience field helps personalize documentation views
Related content is auto-suggested based on category and tags

blocks.title: Best Practice
blocks.content: Use consistent category slugs and tag patterns across all content collections to enable effective search and navigation.
